summary: Import bills from CSV, color-coded status, and improved iCloud sync for payment history.

introduced: Import and export bills plus payment history from CSV
Bundled sample CSV modeled on Chronicle Pro bill layouts
Color-coded bill status bars: paid, upcoming, due soon, partial, and overdue
changed: Empty Bills workspace shows a guided import and add-bill layout instead of a blank table
Bill and payment changes queue iCloud export automatically; sidebar Sync uploads bills and history
CloudKit diagnostics now include BillRecord and BillPaymentRecord probes
